title: Mobile station international subscriber directory number allocation
abstract: Embodiments are concerned with methods and network components which are configured to dynamically assign MSISDNs for a period or periods of time and have particular utility for users whose mobile network subscriptions do not include a MSISDN. This service may be provided via a telecommunications network element configured to: receive a request to provide a home location register, HLR, or a home subscriber server, HSS, with an MSISDN for temporary allocation; access a set of MSISDNs; perform a selection method to select an MSISDN from the set of MSISDNs based on at least one characteristic of the request; and transmit the selected MSISDN for receipt by the HLR or HSS.
claims:
Claims 1. A telecommunications network element for providing Mobile Station International Subscriber Directory Numbers, MSISDNs for use in a telecommunications network, the telecommunications network element being configured to: receive a request to provide a home location register, HLR, or a home subscriber server, HSS, with an MSISDN for temporary allocation to a subscriber profile record, the MSISDN being requested in response to a location update signalling message; perform a selection method to select an MSISDN from the set of MSISDNs based on at least one characteristic of the request; and transmit the selected MSISDN for receipt by the HLR or HSS. 2. The telecommunications network element of claim 1, wherein the selection method comprises identifying a subset of MSISDNs from the set of MSISDNs based on the at least one characteristic of the request and selecting an MSISDN which is not currently allocated to the subscriber profile record. 3. The telecommunications network element of claim 2, wherein the at least one characteristic of the request includes information identifying a mobile subscriber account which is associated with a subscriber profile record to which the selected MSISDN is to be allocated, and wherein the subset of MSISDNs are each associated with the mobile subscriber account. 4. The telecommunications network element of any preceding claim, wherein the telecommunications network element is further configured to maintain temporal data for one or more MSISDNs in the set of MSISDNs. 5. The telecommunications network element of claim 4, wherein the temporal data relates to a previous selection from the set of MSISDNs, including the selected MSISDN. 6. The telecommunications network element of claim 4 or claim 5, wherein for at least one selected MSISDN, the temporal data includes at least one of: an indication of a duration for which the MSISDN is to be allocated to a subscriber profile record; and an indication of a time at which the MSISDN is selected. 7. The telecommunications network element of claim 6, wherein the selection method includes prioritising respective MSISDNs based on a duration that has elapsed since a respective MSISDN was last selected. 8. The telecommunications network element of any preceding claim, wherein the at least one characteristic of the request includes location information representing a Visited Location Register VLR with which the mobile device is registered in the telecommunications network. 9. The telecommunications network element of claim 8, wherein the location information comprises an indication of a Public Land Mobile Network, PLMN, of the Visited Location Register VLR. 10. The telecommunications network element of claim 8 or claim 9, wherein the selected MSISDN has a country and/or area code that corresponds to the location of the mobile device. 11. The telecommunications network element of any preceding claim, wherein the telecommunications network element is further configured to, after the selected MSISDN has been transmitted for receipt by the HLR or HSS, designate the selected MSISDN as unavailable for the selection method for a predetermined period of time. 12. A network element configured with a database comprising a set of subscriber profile records, each subscriber profile record comprising an International Mobile Subscriber Identity, IMSI, and Mobile Station International Subscriber Directory Number, MSISDN, information, the network element being configured to: 

 receive a location update message comprising an IMSI; identify a need to temporarily allocate an MSISDN to a subscriber profile record based on the IMSI; transmit a request for an MSISDN for temporary allocation to the subscriber profile record, the request being transmitted for receipt by a telecommunications network element; receive an MSISDN for temporary allocation to the subscriber profile record; and update the MSISDN information associated with the subscriber profile record to allocate the MSISDN to the subscriber profile record. 13. The network element of claim 12, wherein identifying the need to temporarily allocate the MSISDN comprises: receiving a request originating at a mobile device associated with an IMSI which is comprised in the subscriber profile record; identifying the subscriber profile record in the database based on the IMSI associated with the mobile device; and determining, in the subscriber profile record, data indicating that no MSISDN has been allocated to the subscriber profile record. 14. The network element of claim 12 or claim 13, wherein the MSISDN is allocated to the subscriber profile record for a predetermined period of time, and wherein after the predetermined period of time has expired the network element is configured to update the respective subscriber profile record to indicate that no MSISDN is allocated to the respective subscriber profile. 15. The network element of claim 12 or claim 13, wherein the network element is further configured to: receive an instruction originating from the telecommunications network element to update the subscriber profile record to indicate that the MSISDN is not allocated to the subscriber profile; and 

 in response to the instruction originating from the telecommunications network element, update the subscriber profile record to indicate that no MSISDN is allocated to the subscriber profile. 16. The network element of any of claim 12 to claim 15, wherein the request originating at the mobile device is received via a Public Land Mobile Network, PLMN, and wherein the location update message comprises data identifying a Visited Location Register VLR with which the mobile device is registered in the Public Land Mobile Network, PLMN. 17. The network element of claim 16, wherein the network element is further configured to transmit the allocated MSISDN to the VLR with which the mobile device is registered. 18. The network element of claim 16 or claim 17, wherein the network element is further configured to: receive a location update message originating from the mobile device indicating that the mobile device is no longer registered with the Visited Location Register VLR; and update the subscriber profile record to indicate that no MSISDN is allocated to the subscriber profile record. 19. The network element of claim 18, wherein the network element is further configured to send an update message to the telecommunications network element indicating that the mobile device is no longer registered with the Visited Location Register VLR. 20. The network element of any of claim 12 to claim 19, in the form of a Home Location Register, HLR, or Home Subscriber Server (HSS). 21. The network element of any of claim 12 to claim 19, in the form of a proxy for a Home Location Register, HLR, or Home Subscriber Server (HSS). 22. A method of providing Mobile Station International Subscriber Directory Numbers, MSISDNs for use in a telecommunications network, the method comprising: receiving a request to provide a home location register, HLR, or a home subscriber server, HSS, with an MSISDN for temporary allocation to a subscriber profile record, the MSISDN being requested in response to a location update signalling message; performing a selection method to select an MSISDN from the set of MSISDNs based on at least one characteristic of the request; and transmitting the selected MSISDN for receipt by the HLR or HSS. 23. The method of claim 22, in which the selection method comprises identifying a subset of MSISDNs from the set of MSISDNs based on the at least one characteristic of the request and selecting an MSISDN which is not currently allocated to the subscriber profile record. 24. The method of claim 22 or claim 23, comprising maintaining temporal data for one or more MSISDNs in the set of MSISDNs. 25. The method of claim 24, in which for at least one selected MSISDN, the temporal data includes an indication of a duration for which the MSISDN is to be allocated to a subscriber profile record and optionally an indication of a time at which the MSISDN is selected, and in which the selection method includes prioritising respective MSISDNs based on a duration that has elapsed since a respective MSISDN was last selected. 26. The method of any of claim 22 to claim 25, in which the at least one characteristic of the request includes information identifying a mobile subscriber account which is associated with a subscriber profile record to which the selected MSISDN is to be allocated, and in which the subset of MSISDNs are each associated with the mobile subscriber account. 27. The method of any of claim 22 to claim 26, in which the at least one characteristic of the request includes location information representing a Visited Location Register VLR with which the mobile device is registered in the telecommunications network and the selection method comprises selecting a MSISDN with a country and/or area code that corresponds to the location of the mobile device. 28. The method of any of claim 22 to claim 26, in which the at least one characteristic of the request includes location information comprising an indication of a Public Land Mobile Network, PLMN, of the Visited Location Register VLR and the selection method comprises selecting a MSISDN with a country and/or area code that corresponds to the location of the mobile device. 29. A method of updating a subscriber profile record for a telecommunications network subscriber, the subscriber profile record comprising an International Mobile Subscriber Identity, IMSI, the method comprising: receiving a location update message comprising an IMSI; identifying a need to temporarily allocate an MSISDN to a subscriber profile record based on the IMSI; transmitting a request for an MSISDN for temporary allocation to the subscriber profile record, the request being transmitted for receipt by a telecommunications network element; receiving an MSISDN for temporary allocation to the subscriber profile record; and updating the MSISDN information associated with the subscriber profile record to allocate the MSISDN to the subscriber profile record. 30. The method of claim 29, in which identifying the need to temporarily allocate the MSISDN comprises: receiving a request originating at a mobile device associated with an IMSI which is comprised in the subscriber profile record; identifying the subscriber profile record in the database based on the IMSI associated with the mobile device; and 

 determining, in the subscriber profile record, data indicating that no MSISDN has been allocated to the subscriber profile record. 31. The method of claim 29 or claim 30, comprising: allocating the MSISDN for a predetermined period of time, and, after the predetermined period of time has expired, updating the respective subscriber profile record to indicate that no MSISDN is allocated to the respective subscriber profile. 32. The method of claim 29 or 30, further comprising: receiving an instruction originating from the telecommunications network element to update the subscriber profile record to indicate that the MSISDN is not allocated to the subscriber profile; and in response to the instruction originating from the telecommunications network element, updating the subscriber profile record to indicate that no MSISDN is allocated to the subscriber profile. 33. The method of any of claim 29 to claim 32, in which the request originating at the mobile device is received via a Public Land Mobile Network, PLMN, and in which the location update message comprises data identifying a Visited Location Register VLR with which the mobile device is registered in the Public Land Mobile Network, PLMN, the method further comprising transmitting the allocated MSISDN to the VLR with which the mobile device is registered. 34. The method of claim 33, further comprising: receiving a location update message originating from the mobile device indicating that the mobile device is no longer registered with the Visited Location Register VLR; updating the subscriber profile record to indicate that no MSISDN is allocated to the subscriber profile record; and 

 sending an update message to the telecommunications network element indicating that the mobile device is no longer registered with the Visited Location Register VLR. 35. A computer readable medium comprising a set of instructions, which, when executed by a processing system comprising at least one processor and a memory, causes the processing system to perform the method of any of claim 22 to claim 28. 36. A computer readable medium comprising a set of instructions, which, when executed by a processing system comprising at least one processor and a memory, causes the processing system to perform the method of any of claim 29 to claim 34.
